children.text: Tap here to update your name, email address, phone number, and social network connections.
Medium: Your Facebook friends can contact you directly. Friends of your HeyTell friends can contact you if they know your info.
Receive message notifications when app is not running.
Show an icon in the Status Bar while service is active.
Vibrate upon receiving a new message.
Play a sound upon receiving a new message.
Unread messages older than 30 days will be deleted (except for favorites)
